class \mbox{\hyperlink{classIncidentField}{Incident\+Field}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Abstract base for incident fields (excitations) used in SIE. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract interface for incident electromagnetic excitations. 

This header declares the {\ttfamily \doxylink{classIncidentField}{Incident\+Field}} base class, which defines the common interface for all excitations used by the SIE formulation (i.\+e. plane wave, dipole, \doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian} beam). Implementations provide pointwise field evaluation (E and H), layer-\/aware evaluation helpers, and RWG-\/based excitation integrals used to assemble right-\/hand sides.

The class also exposes a static switch, {\ttfamily Enable\+Accurate}, that enables a more accurate (and potentially more expensive) numerical path for the excitation integrals, intended for validation or difficult near-\/field cases. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{IncidentField_8h_source}{Incident\+Field.\+h}}.
